reviews.comment:
La atención muy buena los precios está igual q en todos lados .lo único q me pareció genial q no pague fue para inflar las cubiertas es gratisss

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good, and the prices are the same as everywhere else. The only thing I thought was great was that I didn't have to pay to inflate the tires; it was free!

reviews.comment:
La atención es correcta , tiene un pequeño maxiquiosco , sector de cambio de aceite , taller de mecanica rapida y el correspondiente lavadero de vehiculos . No le doy 5 estrellas , dado que se aprovechan de la situación que la otra YPF de la ciudad es del mismo dueño y los valores del combustible son mas elevados .

(Translated by Google)
The service is adequate, and it has a small convenience store, an oil change area, a quick-service mechanic shop, and a car wash. I'm not giving it 5 stars because they take advantage of the fact that the other YPF station in town is owned by the same person and their fuel prices are higher.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxcTlXTlpREAE
